name: Muhammad Zohaib
headline: Software Engineer — scalable backend systems, REST APIs & cloud-native apps on AWS & GCP
summary: Software Engineer with production experience building scalable backend systems, REST APIs, and cloud-native applications on AWS and GCP. Proficient in Python, FastAPI, Django, React, and SQL, with a proven track record of delivering end-to-end solutions, from system architecture and database design to CI/CD automation and enterprise security integration.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
